summary: An unnamed antagonist reveals himself as a mastermind creating an endless undead army to avenge his fallen comrades, Adele and Perrion. During a confrontation with an adventurer, the villain recounts the tragic day Adele died at the hands of treacherous adventurers. The adventurer, who previously worked as a mercenary for Adele and knew his bear, Pepe, is overcome with rage at the revelation. The encounter turns into a trap as the villain lures the adventurer in for a lethal surprise attack.
key_moments: The antagonist powers up the undead and vows to conquer the world to avenge Adele and Perrion.
The adventurer confronts the mastermind and discovers the villain's connection to Adele and the use of black magic.
The villain baits the adventurer into a false sense of vulnerability before launching the 'Breath of the Heavenly Demon' attack.
